CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_partitioned_table (id Int32, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(date) ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_replicated_table (id Int32, data String) ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/test_replicated', '1') ORDER BY id;
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP PARTITION '2023-01'; CHECK TABLE test_table;
CREATE TABLE test_log_table (id Int32, data String) ENGINE = Log;
